headline: Workday Expands Google Cloud AI As Investors Weigh Undervalued Signal
summary: Workday (NasdaqGS:WDAY) has expanded its AI partnership with Google Cloud, bringing conversational AI into HR and finance workflows. The company has also launched Adaptive Decision Intelligence in its Planning suite, adding natural language scenario analysis and automated, governed planning tools. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:WDAY, these product moves arrive after a challenging share price stretch. The stock is trading at about $124.5, with returns down 39.5% year to date and down 48.1%...

headline: Workday and Google Cloud Expand Strategic Partnership to Bring AI Agents for HR and Finance Into Employees' Daily Workflows
summary: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY) and Google Cloud today announced an expanded strategic partnership to bring AI agents for HR and finance closer to the people who need them, directly inside the applications they use every day. By combining the Workday Agent System of Record (ASOR) and agent roadmap with Google Cloud's enterprise-ready agent platform and leading models, the partnership will create a single, trusted foundation where agents from Workday, Google Cloud, and third-parties work together on
